issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases.
Skill is vendor-locked to Anthropic models and does not support other AI agents.

scenarios.name: Build a multi-agent TSLA analyzer with bull/bear debate that ends in a final memo
scenarios.rationale: Treatment built a LangGraph StateGraph(TradingState) with fundamentals/technical/news analyst nodes feeding a bull and bear researcher, then a risk and portfolio manager terminating at END; baseline produced a single-prompt analyzer or unstructured multiple LLM calls without graph wiring.

scenarios.name: Add a risk manager step that outputs position sizing and stop-loss
scenarios.rationale: Treatment added a risk_manager node consuming bull_thesis and bear_thesis from TradingState and returning a probability-weighted return, max drawdown, position size %, and stop-loss as documented; baseline produced a generic risk write-up without the state-graph integration or the exact output fields the portfolio manager expects.
